title: UMI World Model
summary: UMI World Model is now in the WAN2.2 TI2V fine-tuning phase: use a concatenated left/right first frame as the image condition, train one dual-wrist TI2V model first, then decide how to inject robot action beyond text and first-frame conditioning.
asset_alt: UMI dataset annotation and subtask segmentation visualization panel
asset_caption: Dataset QA: synchronized wrist views, 3D pose, EEF traces, current segment, and action log after subtask splitting.
details: Use the annotation / subtask-splitting panel to inspect dual wrist videos, task labels, motion curves, and segment boundaries together; compare Gemini with Seed 2.0 Pro video understanding for key-state labels.
Generate bimanual wrist-view videos conditioned on kinematics and gripper state.
Maintain left-right consistency over object state and scene state.
First decision: one-side generation + camera transform, or end-to-end synchronized dual video.
Potential contribution: DiT structure with attention / AdaLN changes, then CameraNoise-style control after the base model works.
Try Genie Envisioner as an additional UMI/world-model probe, especially for whether it can help with envisioning action-conditioned future frames or evaluation cases.

Meeting update 2026-05-25: WAN2.2 fine-tuning is starting with left/right wrist views concatenated into one first-frame image condition; train one TI2V model first instead of separate left/right models.

Initial training scale: prepare 1k-2k UMI clips/trajectories for the first run; compare 5B versus 14B cost, but keep the v0 path on the manageable TI2V fine-tune route unless 14B quality justifies the extra compute.

Training audit: inspect the LingBot / LingBot-World training recipe to understand which parameters/modules were trained and how interaction/action information enters the world model; use it as a reference for active simulation, not as a drop-in baseline.

Cosmos Predict 2.5 prompt update: explicitly describe the concatenated input layout. The left half is the left wrist/gripper view, the right half is the right wrist/gripper view, and the visible lower gripper parts are the interactive end-effectors that can contact and move objects.

Action-injection survey: compare text action tokens, first-frame conditioning, trajectory/control maps, latent-channel concatenation, cross-attention adapters, AdaLN/action encoders, and Ctrl-World-style action-conditioned UNet paths; pick the smallest v1 path that can encode dual-arm pose and gripper state.

Evaluation gallery format: use a TI2V qualitative-comparison layout where each sample shows generated video, matched GT video, and the exact text prompt/caption input together, plus run_id/model/metric metadata.
Server storage: install the 10T mechanical hard drive from ME onto the server, then download / stage UMI data for the WAN2.2 fine-tuning run.

references.title: SANA-WM: Efficient Minute-Scale World Modeling with Hybrid Linear Diffusion Transformer
references.notes: Reference for efficient minute-scale world modeling, hybrid linear attention, precise 6-DoF camera control, and metric pose-supervised long-video generation.

risks_decisions: 时间帧切分精度会直接影响 caption / relabel 质量，需要早做小样本检查，并比较 Gemini 与 Seed 2.0 Pro 标注的一致性。
初版数据规模要控制在能快速迭代的范围，避免一开始就把训练周期拉长。
Evaluation 需要同时覆盖视觉质量、时序定位、动作条件一致性。
基模结论：v0 主线进入 WAN2.2 TI2V 少量微调；首帧使用左右 wrist view 拼接，只训练一个双视角模型，避免过早拆成两个单视角模型。
训练规模决策：首轮控制在 1k-2k 条，先证明双腕视角一致性、动作条件可用性和失败样例可解释，再扩到 5k-10k。
Action 注入风险：如果只靠 prompt 和第一帧，模型可能学到外观和短期运动但不听机器人轨迹；必须尽快比较 token、control-map、latent-channel、adapter/AdaLN/action-encoder 等注入路径。
Cosmos Predict 2.5 继续作为 prompt / inference 对照时，system prompt 必须写清左右拼接语义和可交互夹爪区域，否则模型容易把双腕画面当普通拼图或不相关双视角。

timeline.target_note: Paper target for UMI World Model; exact conference-year deadline should be filled once the official schedule is fixed.
